creator: ah@linux-hq.de
text:
(In reply to Seyed Pouria Mousavizadeh Tehrani from comment #1)

Too much effort for something I've not used over the last decade (including this port, perl and freebsd).

Just got an email from portscout and thought I quickly setup a freebsd vm and update the port.

Please take my email out of MAINTAINER (I thought I requested that long ago...Maybe not).

Thanks,
Andreas
